diagnoses.name: Displaced comminuted fracture of the shaft of the right tibia
diagnoses.evidence_span: She sustained a displaced comminuted fracture of the shaft of the right tibia

diagnoses.name: Epilepsy, unspecified, not intractable, without status epilepticus
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient has a significant past medical history including epilepsy, which is currently unspecified and not intractable without documented status epilepticus

diagnoses.name: Legal blindness as defined in the USA
diagnoses.evidence_span: She also carries a diagnosis of legal blindness as defined in the USA

diagnoses.name: Unspecified mental disorder due to known physiological condition
diagnoses.evidence_span: Additionally, she has an unspecified mental disorder due to a known physiological condition

procedures.name: Operative reposition of the right tibia with open approach and intramedullary internal fixation device placement
procedures.evidence_span: The patient underwent operative reposition of the right tibia with open approach and intramedullary internal fixation device placement on hospital day 1

medications.name: Oxycodone immediate release
medications.evidence_span: Oxycodone immediate release 5-10 mg PO every 4-6 hours as needed for pain

medications.name: Morphine sulfate
medications.evidence_span: Morphine sulfate 2-4 mg IV as needed for breakthrough pain

medications.name: Trazodone
medications.evidence_span: Trazodone 50 mg PO at bedtime and 100 mg PO at bedtime

medications.name: Divalproex delayed release
medications.evidence_span: Divalproex delayed release 500 mg PO BID

medications.name: Ketorolac
medications.evidence_span: Ketorolac 15 mg IV every 6 hours as needed

medications.name: Enoxaparin sodium
medications.evidence_span: Enoxaparin sodium 40 mg SC daily for 14 days post-discharge

medications.name: Quetiapine fumarate
medications.evidence_span: Quetiapine fumarate 150-300 mg PO at bedtime

medications.name: Acetaminophen
medications.evidence_span: Acetaminophen 1000 mg PO every 6 hours as needed

medications.name: Cefazolin
medications.evidence_span: She received perioperative antibiotic prophylaxis with cefazolin

medications.name: Ondansetron
medications.evidence_span: Antiemetics with ondansetron were used as needed

medications.name: Dextrose and normal saline
medications.evidence_span: IV fluid support with dextrose and normal saline was provided

chief_complaint: Right leg pain and swelling following a fall
